race.comment: Former NSW galloper LITTLE LUNCH (6) is having her first run for the new stable but will appreciate the drop back in company here. Sure to be hitting the line with gusto. PRAISE YOU (3) has placed three from three over this distance range and looks to be building up to a maiden victory. Include in calculations while fresh. VILA MOON (5) is a former Victorian first-up. Ran sixth in a trial at Ipswich and opened last campaign with a third at Mt Gambier over 1400m. Any market confidence must be noted. AIRBURST (7) good effort last start, beaten 2.75 lengths into second over 1150m at Gold Coast Poly. In the mix.
